title: Supersymmetry Structure and Phenomena
abstract: A fairly non-technical introduction to and survey of supersymmetry phenomenology with pedagogical emphasis, including exercises. Suitable for both theorists and experimentalists. The manuscript appeared as a Springer-Verlag monograph in physics. The body of the manuscript is provided here with the publisher`s permission.
comment: Lecture Notes in Physics Monographs Vol. m 68 N. Polonsky "Supersymmetry Structure and Phenomena - Extensions of the Standard Model",XV, 169 pages, 2001 (Springer-Verlag, Heidelberg)
